note: Mumzworld landing-page component system + reusable CMS assets, so the uniform page reads as native. Tokens here AUGMENT data/design-tokens.json with values confirmed from the live rendered site.

scrollerMechanics.arrows: circular 40x40, rounded-full, bg #F4F4F6, text #43454C, 1px #DFDFE7 border, hover->white, positioned 25px from edges, RTL mirrored (rotate-180)
scrollerMechanics.autoRotate: ONLY the top hero carousel; content rails do not auto-advance
scrollerMechanics.behaviour: snap to slide, overflow hidden, peek created by item-width vs container, drag/swipe enabled

components.name: utilityBar
components.desc: thin dark-indigo top strip with rotating trust messages (Trusted by Millions of Mums, Same Day Delivery with Yalla)

components.name: header
components.desc: white sticky: round pink logo + large rounded search pill + locale + sign-in + cart; below it horizontal category nav starting with pink SALE pill

components.name: heroCarousel
components.desc: full-width single-slide auto-rotating banner carousel, rounded corners, Shop Now pill

components.name: promoTileStrip
components.desc: ~5 small utility/service tiles per view (Clearance, 2-hour delivery, Mumz Services, Personalized Picks)

components.name: circularCategoryScroller
components.desc: Explore All Categories: ~9 round category icons + label per view

components.name: brandSpotlightScroller
components.desc: ~6 landscape brand tiles with pink brand-name bar

components.name: productRail
components.desc: horizontal scroller of standard product cards (~5/view); h3 heading left

components.name: themedBannerRailPair
components.desc: DOMINANT rhythm: full-width pastel banner (headline | tagline + Shop Now pill, color-coded) immediately followed by a matching product rail

components.name: editorialTiles3up
components.desc: 3-up lifestyle image tiles with overlaid labels (With You Every Step: Pregnancy/New Mumz/Toddler Mumz)

components.name: subCategoryTileScroller
components.desc: PLP: rounded-square image tiles with label + offer hook (Lunchboxes Up to 75% OFF)

components.name: characterCircleScroller
components.desc: PLP: circular theme/character filters (Superhero, Disney, Unicorn, Space)

components.name: mumzPicks4upGrid
components.desc: 4-up promo tile grid on a colored panel with pink From-price badges (School Clothes, Premium Picks, Value Bundles, Educational Tools)

components.name: valuePropChipRow
components.desc: Why Mumz Choose Mumzworld: row of pink-outlined pill chips (Mum-Approved Brands, Curated by Stage, Hassle-Free Returns)

components.name: brandLogoScroller
components.desc: Mum-Approved Brands: horizontal scroller of brand logos (~7-8/view, ~32-40px tall)

components.name: plpFilterGrid
components.desc: left sticky filter sidebar (~250px: Sale/Discount toggles + collapsible facets incl. Age, Gender, Clothes Size) + 4-col product grid + Sort by + result count; Algolia-rendered
components.criticalReuse: Age + Gender + Clothes Size facets map directly to our school/year/gender flow

components.name: productCard
components.desc: square image on white; top-left green -XX% + Exclusive/Sale label (white 12px w800); top-right wishlist heart; red circular '+' add button overlapping image bottom-right; title #43454c 14px 2-line; price row (bold w800 current + struck original #6b6d72 + pink discount % w600); rating '4.8 (416)'; yellow delivery-promise chip

components.name: seoTextBlock
components.desc: bottom long-form SEO copy + 'Learn more about {Category}' expandable

components.name: footer
components.desc: multi-column links + app badges + payment logos + press Wall of Fame

recommendedFlow: Hero carousel -> value-prop chips -> STEP1 School (search pill + circular school-crest scroller) -> STEP2 Year (circular/tile scroller FS1..Y13 + sticky school context banner) -> STEP3 Gender (3-up editorial tiles Girls/Boys/Unisex) -> STEP4 Suggestions (Mumz Picks 4-up bundles -> uniform product rail -> gated cross-sell rails -> escape hatch to filtered grid) -> brand logos -> SEO block -> footer
